shadcn-html / label

CSS Only

Label

Renders an accessible label associated with form controls. Built on the native <label> element with :has() for focus-reactive styling. No JavaScript required.

Component Specification — components/label/label.md

Native basis

<label> element. Browser provides built-in click-to-focus association with form controls.

Web Platform APIs

<label> :has()

Accessibility

• Use for attribute matching the input's id

• Clicking the label focuses the associated input (native behavior)

• Required indicator * uses aria-hidden="true"

Default

Basic label paired with an input. Click the label to focus the input.

<label class="label" for="email">Email</label>
<input class="input" type="email" id="email" placeholder="you@example.com">

Required

Required indicator using a red asterisk.

<label class="label" for="name">
  Name <span aria-hidden="true" class="text-destructive">*</span>
</label>
<input class="input" type="text" id="name" required>

Optional hint

Hint text indicating the field is optional.

<label class="label" for="bio">
  Bio <span class="label-hint">(optional)</span>
</label>

Disabled

Dimmed label for disabled fields.

<label class="label label-disabled" for="disabled">Disabled field</label>
<input class="input" type="text" id="disabled" disabled>

Full specification → components/label/label.md
